text.message: My second game in a row without seeing a single 4
Black is going to run away with this
I think it was better to block him on 5 wheat, even it is not so good for me
You're not even trying to win xd
If I take that, you’re likely at 9 points right now
That would be me not trying to win
If I want to win, I can’t hand you the game
4th is the same as second my guy, neither wins
2nd place has a chance to become first
Not if you hand first the win, you’re not as bright as I thought
